scoring_model.description: Explicit weighting for contradiction/issue scoring dimensions. Weights sum to 1.0.

delay_impact_score.description: How much delay this issue adds to the planning process

legal_risk_score.description: Risk of legal challenge, appeal overturn, or judicial review

severity_score.description: Overall severity of the contradiction or friction

frequency_score.description: How often this issue arises in practice across authorities

fixability_score.description: Ease of resolving the issue (higher = easier to fix, inverted in weighted calc)

scoring_model.weighted_score_formula: sum(dimension_score * weight) for all dimensions except fixability is inverted: (6 - fixability_score) * weight
